data.title: Kalshi Achieves Record Trading Volume in Prediction Market
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Artemis indicates that Kalshi's prediction market reached a historic trading volume of $474.2 million on January 17. During the same period, Polymarket recorded a daily trading volume of $263 million.

data.title: Russia’s budget deficit threatens ruble status as world’s best performing currency
data.description:
Last year, Cryptopolitan reported that Russia’s currency won a race no one expected it to enter. The ruble has beaten every other major currency against the dollar so far this year, jumping 45% since early last year. It’s now trading close to 78 per dollar, a level not seen since before Russia launched its full […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-threatens-ruble-status-in-the-world/

data.title: IBM, Alphabet and Microsoft top UBS’s quantum computing leaders list
data.description:

The call comes at a time when tech stocks already trade at rich levels, and investors are hunting for the next corner that could shape what comes next. UBS says this part of the market stands […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ibm-goog-msft-top-quantum-computing-leaders/

data.title: Bitcoin Hits $0 on Paradex After Starknet Glitch — Mass Liquidations Force Rollback
data.description:
Paradex rolled back its protocol after a Starknet-related glitch briefly mispriced Bitcoin at $0, triggering widespread liquidations across its perpetual trading platform.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-zero-paradex-starknet-glitch-rollback/

data.title: IMF raises growth forecast amid tariff and AI risks
data.description:
According to a diplomatic Monetary Fund assessment released on Monday, the global economy is expected to grow faster this year than previously anticipated, but rising trade barriers and escalating diplomatic tensions may impede that growth. According to the organization’s most recent quarterly assessment, the global economy is expected to expand by 3. 3% this year, up […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/imf-raises-growth-forecast-ai-risks/

data.title: Here’s What’s Dominating Crypto Conversations Right Now, According to Santiment
data.description:
According to Santiment social data, crypto discussions at the start of the week are being driven less by charts and more by narratives tied to risk, speculation, and geopolitics. Santiment’s social-volume dashboard highlights five dominant themes shaping trader sentiment across platforms.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/heres-whats-dominating-crypto-conversations-right-now-according-to-santiment/

data.title: Coinbase CEO will attend the World Economic Forum to promote crypto legislation, economic freedom, and asset tokenization.
data.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong posted on the X platform that he has arrived in Davos, Switzerland, to attend the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting. His main objectives this week are: • To discuss economic freedom with world leaders and how cryptocurrencies can revolutionize their financial systems; • To continue pushing forward the legislative process for market structures; • To continue advocating for asset tokenization to promote the democratization of capital access.

data.title: Emirates NBD issues $272 million digital bond leveraging DLT
data.description:
Emirates NBD, a banking group in the Middle East, North Africa, and Türkiye (MENAT) region, has issued a $272 million (AED 1 billion) digital bond utilizing DLT (Distributed Ledger Technology). This is the largest public digital bond issued in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region. The digital bond will be listed on Nasdaq […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/emirates-nbd-issues-272-million-digital-bond/

data.description:

source: https://coincu.com/news/coinbase-acquires-clearing-company/

data.title: Privacy Policy Zama Mainnet Launches Staking Functionality
data.description: Zama has announced the launch of its mainnet staking feature. ZAMA tokens have both fee and staking utility. Fees paid by users will be burned by the protocol, which will also mint tokens at an initial 5% annualized issuance rate to pay operators. Operators must stake ZAMA tokens to participate and receive rewards. 40% of the rewards are allocated to FHE nodes, and 60% to KMS nodes.

data.title: Crypto markets slide as Bitcoin dips below $93K amid liquidations and tariff-driven uncertainty
data.description:
Bitcoin and major altcoins moved lower as leveraged liquidations accelerated and macro uncertainty resurfaced, pushing total crypto market cap down.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/crypto-markets-slide-as-bitcoin-dips-below-93k-amid-liquidations-and-tariff-driven-uncertainty/
